title: Bridge Essay: Investigating the complex cortical dynamics of an advanced concentrative absorpt

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Investigating the complex cortical dynamics of an advanced concentrative absorption meditation called jhanas (ACAM-J): ageometric eigenmode analysis.** — Cereb Cortex. PMID: 40037411. DOI: 10.1093/cercor/bhaf039. Advanced meditation has been associated with long- and short-term psychological changes such as bliss, profound insight, and transformation of well-being. However, most advanced meditation neuroimaging analyses have implemented primarily spatially-localized approaches, focusing on discrete regional changes in activity rather than distributed dynamics. The present study uses ageometric eigenmode decomposition of ultrahigh field-strength 7T functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data from a
